intro.h: やほぉ！　二シャントです~~
intro.p: I'm a linguist, game designer, and front end developer, and also lots of other things. Welcome to my new homepage.

os-error.p: You might be wondering, "Why does your website look like this?" In a world full of so-called "best practices" and "design principles", something's been lost. The glorious age of the web as a weird, wacky place is a distant memory.

business-card.titles: 研究言語学者 | フロントエンドエンジニア | ゲーム開発者 | 教育者 | 料理人 | 政治アナリスト | 市内農家 | 採集者 | スキーヤー | 釣り人
